title: Windfall Decision
scenario: A delayed performance bonus of ₹1,50,000 lands in your account. You have a home loan running at about 9% interest. You could prepay a chunk of the loan or invest the bonus in a diversified equity SIP expected to return around 12% over the long run.

choices.label: Invest the windfall in a long-term SIP, since the expected return beats your loan rate
choices.lesson: When expected investment returns exceed your loan's interest rate, investing usually builds more wealth than prepaying.

choices.label: Prepay the home loan to cut interest and feel debt-free sooner
choices.lesson: Prepaying offers a guaranteed, risk-free 'return' equal to your loan rate and reduces stress, which can outweigh chasing higher but uncertain gains.
